name: Mighty & Crafty Filling Aid
summary: Mighty & Crafty Filling Aid — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Mighty & Crafty Filling Aid exemplifies Storz & Bickel's dedication to precision by streamlining the process of packing the chamber of the Mighty or Crafty Plus with dry herbs. Its ease of use makes packing effortless. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
